hero.name: Montse
hero.subtitle: I naturally connect with people and turn challenges into positive outcomes :)

about.title: Operations & Client Success
about.intro: I am an Operations & Client Success professional with a hybrid background in high-end hospitality, e-commerce, and veterinary medicine.
about.goal: My career is built on a simple but powerful goal: streamlining complex processes so that people leave happier and more successful than they arrived.

clinical.title: Clinical Discipline & High-Energy Leadership
clinical.text: As a foreign-trained Veterinarian (DVM) and a Licensed Zumba Instructor, I bring a unique blend of analytical precision and contagious vitality to everything I do. I don't just resolve tasks; I lead with energy and empathy.

tech.title: The Tech & Data Edge
tech.text: With a background in Digital Marketing & E-commerce, I bridge the gap between data and human connection. I specialize in improving the 'behind-the-scenes' of a business, using Excel as my favorite playground.

journey.title: My Journey
journey.narrative:
Moving to Canada as a foreign-trained Veterinarian (DVM) has been a true masterclass in adaptability, resilience, and communication.

I have experienced firsthand what it feels like to navigate new systems, new languages, and unfamiliar environments, and that is exactly what shaped my approach to customer success and client-facing roles.
journey.quote: I don't just resolve issues; I support people through moments of confusion, uncertainty, or frustration with patience, clarity, and empathy.
journey.sparkle: My former mentors often describe my presence as having a “sparkle”, but I see it as a genuine passion for making people's day easier, calmer, and better.

playground.title: Business Efficiency via Excel
playground.subtitle: Turning messy data into strategic tools
playground.description: I develop custom automated trackers and dashboards using advanced Excel — Pivot Tables, VLOOKUPs, Complex Logic.
playground.funFact: Fun fact: I love Excel and it is like my favorite little playground.
playground.impact: Reduced manual reporting time and improved accuracy in tracking key business metrics.

skills.title: What I Bring to the Table

toolkit.title: Technical Toolkit
toolkit.excelDetail: Pivot Tables, VLOOKUPs, Complex Formulas — my favorite playground for efficiency.
toolkit.crmDetail: Proficient in Salesforce and HubSpot for client pipeline management.
toolkit.dataAiDetail: Familiar with Google Analytics and AI-driven productivity tools.

colagican.title: ColagiCan: From Clinical Expertise to E-Commerce Success
colagican.vision: Identified a niche in the pet wellness market for high-quality hydrolyzed collagen. I bridged the gap between clinical veterinary science and digital retail.
colagican.operation: As the Founder, I managed the end-to-end business cycle: from supplier logistics and administrative compliance to CRM management and direct-to-consumer sales.
colagican.result: Built a brand based on trust and data. I didn't just sell a product; I managed a community of pet owners, proving my ability to lead business operations within the veterinary industry.
colagican.competencies: Strategic Sales, Supply Chain Management, B2B Sales, Entrepreneurship.

hospitality.title: Operational Excellence | Hospitality & Front Desk
hospitality.environment: Fast-paced hospitality operations, requiring constant trilingual (EN/FR/ES) communication.
hospitality.impact: I act as the "operational engine" of the front desk. My focus is on resolving complex guest issues with extreme empathy while maintaining strict administrative accuracy. My supervisors recognize my "sparkle"—the ability to turn a crisis into a positive guest experience.
hospitality.result: Consistent 5-star guest satisfaction and a streamlined administrative workflow.
hospitality.competencies: Conflict Resolution, Trilingual Communication, Office Administration, Relationship Building.

atd.title: Front Desk & Operational Support | ATD Clubhouse
atd.experience: I joined ATD Clubhouse during its opening phase. Being part of a new business meant I had to be versatile, handling everything from the first customer greetings to the daily organization of the facility.
atd.operations: Built the initial administrative foundations: managed member accounts, scheduling, and payments from day one.
atd.client: Leveraged my veterinary background to build immediate trust with pet owners, directly increasing the initial client base.
atd.data: Managed daily sales reports to monitor member retention and business growth.

clinical.title: Clinical Veterinary Medicine | Foreign-Trained DVM
clinical.experience: Five years of clinical practice managing complex medical cases and high-pressure environments.
clinical.impact: Handled complex consultations and medical logistics, proving my ability to stay calm and precise in life-or-death situations.
clinical.communication: Coordinated public health campaigns and served as the vital link between medical teams and clients, ensuring clear communication of technical information.
clinical.rigor: Maintained meticulous medical records and strict adherence to safety protocols.
clinical.competencies: Crisis Management, Strategic Coordination, Clinical Logistics, Technical Communication.

contact.title: Ready to Dive In
contact.tagline: Always ready to dive into new systems, messy data, and high-stakes client relations.
